assertions.title: Setting from to current to value swaps them

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:5199, clear localStorage, select chain=arbitrum
steps.observed: From=USDC, To=WETH — confirmed by reading field values

steps.action: Type 'WETH' in the from field, select WETH from dropdown
steps.expected: Swap triggered: from becomes WETH, to becomes previous from (USDC)
steps.observed: Dropdown showed WETH option; after clicking, From=WETH (0x82aF49447D8a07e3bd95BD0d56f35241523fBab1), To=USDC (0xaf88d065e77c8cC2239327C5EDb3A432268e5831)

steps.expected: From label shows WETH icon+symbol, To label shows USDC icon+symbol
steps.observed: From Token label: '♦ WETH', To Token label: '🔵 USDC' — both updated correctly

evidence.network: n/a — pure frontend state operation, no API call for swap

assertions.title: Setting to to current from value swaps them

steps.action: Type 'USDC' in the to field, select USDC from dropdown
steps.expected: Swap triggered: to becomes USDC, from becomes previous to (WETH)
steps.observed: After selecting USDC in to field: From=WETH (0x82aF49447D8a07e3bd95BD0d56f35241523fBab1), To=USDC (0xaf88d065e77c8cC2239327C5EDb3A432268e5831)

steps.expected: From label shows WETH icon+symbol, To label shows USDC icon+symbol
steps.observed: From Token: '♦ WETH', To Token: '🔵 USDC' — both updated correctly

steps.action: Type 'ARB' in the from field, select ARB (Arbitrum token) from dropdown
steps.expected: Only from changes to ARB; to remains WETH (no swap, since ARB ≠ WETH)

steps.action: Reset localStorage, reload, select chain=arbitrum; read initial labels via JS
steps.expected: From label: 'From Token  USDC', To label: 'To Token  WETH'

steps.action: Select WETH in the from field (current to value) to trigger swap
steps.expected: Swap occurs; from becomes WETH, to becomes USDC

steps.action: Read label text after swap via JS
steps.expected: From label: 'From Token  WETH' (with icon), To label: 'To Token  USDC' (with icon)
steps.observed: allLabels: ['Chain', 'From Token  WETH', 'To Token  USDC', 'Amount', 'Block'] — both labels updated with correct token symbol and icon

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. Token swap behavior works correctly in both directions (from→to conflict and to→from conflict). Normal (non-conflicting) selection does not trigger a swap. Label rows correctly reflect the new tokens (icon + symbol) after any swap.
